name: Crockpot Chili Beef Short Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the short ribs in a pot of boiling water and simmer for 10 minutes.
Remove the ribs from the water and drain well to remove as much fat as possible.
(This step can be done the evening before to save time in the morning.)
2. Brown the ribs in hot oil. Remove them and drain all but 1 tablespoon of the oil.
3. Add chopped garlic and lightly brown it in the oil.
4. Add chili powder, tomato sauce, and bring to a simmer.
(This step can be done the evening before to save more time.)
5. Sprinkle ribs with salt and pepper. Place them in the crockpot.
6. Add the sauce and sliced onion. Cover and slow cook for 6 to 8 hours on low heat.
7. Remove the bones from the pot, skim off any visible fat.
Add the kidney beans, cover, and cook on high heat for one hour.
8. Serve with cornbread.
